header.title: 15x4
header.subtitle: – SHARE YOUR KNOWLEDGE
header.description: Anyone can be a part of it — speak, share what excites you. This is a space for young scientists and those who simply can't live without learning.

join.title: JOIN THE EVENTS
join.ideaText: Click here if you have a topic you'd like to learn more about
join.speakerText: And here, if you'd like to join and give a lecture
join.speakerButton: I want to be a speaker

whoWeAre.title: WHO WE ARE?
whoWeAre.description: The <bold>15x4</bold> project was born in Kharkiv and launched a wave of decentralized movement of young scientists and science enthusiasts. It's a Ukrainian adaptation of the short TED Talks format that quickly spread to other cities in Ukraine and Eastern European countries.
whoWeAre.mission: We promote science popularization by making knowledge accessible to everyone through short, dynamic lectures.

format.title: FORMAT
format.description1: 4 lectures of 15 minutes each + Q&A. <italic>[Offline]</italic> with registration or <italic>[online]</italic> streaming.
format.description2: Each event consists of 4 topics that create a <italic>balance of different fields</italic> of science:

technical.title: Technical
technical.description: How do algorithms manage finances or houses become smarter?

natural.title: Natural Science
natural.description: From climate chaos to neural connections in the brain.

humanities.title: Humanities
humanities.description: Why languages evolve or migration changes societies — stories about ourselves.

wildcard.title: Wild card
wildcard.description: From microplastics in oceans to psychological illusions.

register.title: // CREATE ACCOUNT
register.errorPasswordShort: password must be at least 8 characters

confirmEmail.title: // CHECK YOUR EMAIL
confirmEmail.message: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to continue.

waitApproval.title: // ALMOST THERE
waitApproval.message: Your account is pending review by our team. We'll notify you by email when it's approved.

settings.title: // ACCOUNT SETTINGS
settings.passwordHint: leave blank to keep current password

myLectures.title: // MY LECTURES
myLectures.empty: you haven't added any lectures yet

myEvents.title: // MY EVENTS
myEvents.empty: you haven't added any events yet
